title: premna stenantha
intro: Premna stenantha, also known as the Premna stenantha plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to India and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Premna stenantha can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully explore its potential benefits and applications.
